text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: emaste

Log:
  MFC r306098 (br): Use kqueue(2) instead of select(2).

  This helps to ensure we will not lose SIGINT sent by parent to child.

  PR:		212562, 228492

Changes:
_U  stable/11/
  stable/11/lib/libutil/tests/pidfile_test.c
